name: Peanut Butter Twists
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, sift the flour with sugar and salt.
Add shortening, cream cheese, and milk. Mix on the lowest speed of an electric mixer until dough begins to form well. Shape into a ball.
2. Roll out on a floured surface to a 20 x 8 inch rectangle. Cut in half to make two 10 x 8-inch rectangles.
3. Spread one half with peanut butter (crunchy if desired); top with the apple butter. Place the second half of dough on top of the first. Brush with milk and sprinkle with a small amount of granulated sugar.
4. Cut into strips measuring 5 x 1/2 inches. Gently twist twice. Place on well-greased cookie sheets and bake in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 7-10 minutes, or until light golden brown. Do not overbake. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Makes 30 twists.
